intentAndPurpose.intent: Circular single-text action button (max 2 characters, e.g. "Ag", "En"). Attention level drives the visual: high=bold fill, medium=subtle fill, low=ghost. 3 sizes (S/M/L). Shape customisable per brand.

props.name: children
props.description: Text label content — max 2 characters (e.g. "Ag", "En", "A", "12"). This component renders as a circular button; longer text breaks the shape. Text exceeding 2 characters will be truncated in development with a warning.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent appearance role. 'auto' resolves to 'primary'. Default: 'auto'.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for screen readers (optional — children text is visible).

props.name: attention
props.description: Attention level — drives the visual variant. high → bold fill (solid accent bg, on-bold-high text) medium → subtle fill (tinted bg, accent text) low → ghost (transparent bg, accent text) Default: 'high'.

props.name: condensed
props.description: Condensed mode: reduces height and padding while keeping the same typography.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch to fill container width — overrides circular shape.

props.name: loading
props.description: Loading state — shows circular progress indicator replacing the text label. Disables interaction while loading.

props.name: size
props.description: Button size. Default: 'm'. S/M/L only (no XS).
